channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Rep. Jordan refers Jack Smith to DOJ for charges over alleged false testimony
item.description: House Judiciary Chairman Jim Jordan referred former special counsel Jack Smith to the DOJ, alleging he misled Congress during testimony.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] New Hampshire poll puts Ocasio-Cortez ahead of Buttigieg among 2028 Democrats
item.description: A New Hampshire poll shows Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez leading potential Democratic presidential contenders, while JD Vance tops the GOP field.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Secret Service investigates alleged leak of VP JD Vance's travel plans
item.description: A Secret Service agent assigned to Vice President JD Vance has been placed on leave amid an internal investigation into an alleged media leak.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Susan Solves It: Driving costs
item.description: Tampa Bay 28 Reporter Susan El Khoury advises drivers to calculate insurance and financing costs before buying a vehicle to better understand the total cost of ownership.

item.title: [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Who does your team play? Check out the 2026 Sarasota, Manatee counties weekly high school football schedules

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] News to Know for July 23
item.description: Families react to PSTA reaching settlement in 2025 ferry crash. Plus, recent rabies case prompts free vaccination event in Polk County.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Parents are stretching back-to-school budgets amid growing economic concerns
item.description: Families are approaching the 2026 back-to-school season cautiously as rising costs and economic uncertainty push more shoppers to focus on budgets and deals.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Powerball jackpot grows to $600 million
item.description: There was no Powerball jackpot winner in Wednesday night's drawing, according to the lottery's website.

[FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Tampa woman files police report over man repeatedly following, photographing her while running on Bayshore
item.description: A Tampa runner contacted police Saturday after repeatedly catching a man photographing her without consent along Bayshore Boulevard.
